detail.description:
Crossrim, a continent torn apart by chaos.

Following an ancient war, the world remains mired in an unfinished narrative.

Your choices, battles, and your guild
will rewrite the fate of this world.

Crosrim is a true hardcore MMORPG,
designed around large-scale PvP, guild wars, and sieges.

■ Crossrim, the Heart of the Narrative
A story-driven dungeon experience that uncovers the truth behind the ancient wars surrounding the continent,
a farming system for ancient tomestones scattered by conflic
